ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlight the part of the suggestion that is matched in accent color.
ast.target: 用强调色高亮显示建议中匹配的部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: E.g. Searching for 'shuffle' will find 🔀 (twisted_rightwards_arrow). Tags may sometimes be vague or unintuitive.
ast.target: 例如，搜索 'shuffle' 将找到 🔀 (twisted_rightwards_arrow)。标签有时可能模糊或不直观。

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在标签结果上显示短代码

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Disable this if autocomplete is sometimes not triggering when it should.
ast.target: 如果自动完成有时未按预期触发，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: If glitched, reload obsidian or change the Text Font in Appearance
ast.target: 如果出现故障，请重新加载 Obsidian 或在外观设置中更改文本字体

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 请在以下位置报告任何错误：
